data.title: XRP ETF verdict looms: June 17 decision could trigger price surge amid institutional inflows
data.description:
12-6-2025 – A pivotal moment looms for XRP, the cryptocurrency that’s once again capturing the financial world’s attention. On 17 June, the United States’ financial regulator, the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), is poised to deliver a verdict on a proposed XRP Spot Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF). This decision could prove a watershed for the digital [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/xrp-etf-verdict-looms-june-17-decision-could-trigger-price-surge-amid-institutional-inflows/

data.title: US President Trump suggests the Federal Reserve cut interest rates by 200 basis points
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump suggested that the Federal Reserve cut interest rates by 200 basis points. Sources said the Trump administration is expected to announce a renewable fuel quota proposal this Friday. (Jinshi)

data.title: Michael Saylor: Strategy will take the lead in the BTC-backed fixed income market
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Michael Saylor posted on the X platform that Strategy will take the lead in the Bitcoin-backed fixed income market.

data.title: USDC Goes Live on XRPL Enabling Fast Stablecoin Transactions
data.description:
USDC is now available directly on the XRP Ledger, expanding access to fast, secure, stablecoin transactions without the need for bridges. Concurrently, USDC recently went live on World Chain.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/12/usdc-goes-live-on-xrpl-enabling-fast-stablecoin-transactions-heres-all/

data.title: Tony G Co-Investment purchased 10,387.685 HYPE tokens and plans to deploy HyperLiquid ecosystem
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Tony G Co-Investment Holdings Ltd., a Canadian listed company, announced that it has completed the acquisition of HYPE tokens, the native assets of the Hyperliquid ecosystem, with a total purchase of 10,387.685 HYPE tokens, an average purchase price of US$42.24 per token, and a total transaction amount of US$438,828.46. (Newsfilecorp)

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Inaugural Internship Season Opens Applications
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, the Ethereum Foundation announced the launch of the first "Ethereum Internship Season", which is now open for applications. This internship program was jointly initiated by 18 teams within the ecosystem and provides more than 30 paid, remote-friendly summer internship positions covering development, research, design, marketing, operations and other fields.

data.description:
Dogecoin price at crucial juncture as signs of fatigue emerge on markets
source: https://u.today/692-billion-dogecoin-rocks-market-as-doge-price-dips-7

data.title: Aura's market value briefly exceeded US$200 million, up more than 130% in 24 hours
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to GMGN data, the market value of Aura, a meme coin on Sol, briefly exceeded $200 million, with a 24-hour increase of more than 130%, and is now reported at a market value of $195 million.
Odaily reminds users that the price of meme coins fluctuates greatly, and investors should pay attention to risks.

data.title: Trump: Fed Chairman Powell will not be fired, he just needs to lower interest rates
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump said that he would not fire Federal Reserve Chairman Powell, he just needs to lower interest rates. I hope (the Federal Reserve) will lower interest rates. We have a lot of short-term debt, and I like long-term low-interest debt. If we lower interest rates by 1%, it means paying 1% less. (Jinshi)

data.title: Trump Urges Federal Reserve to Lower Interest Rates
data.description: According to Odaily, U.S. President Donald Trump has stated that he does not intend to dismiss Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell. Instead, he emphasized the need for the Federal Reserve to reduce interest rates. Trump expressed his preference for long-term, low-interest debt, noting that a 1% reduction in interest rates would result in a corresponding decrease in payments. He highlighted the significant amount of short-term debt currently held and reiterated his desire for lower rates.

data.title: USDT issuer Tether buys 32% stake in Canada’s gold royalty firm
data.description:
Tether’s investment in Canada’s Elemental Altus Royalties follows the company’s strategy to “integrate long-term, stable assets such as gold and Bitcoin in its ecosystem. ”
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/tether-buys-32-percent-stake-canada-elemental-altus?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Aethir launches global KOL ambassador program Aethir Tribe
data.description: According to official news, Aethir has launched the KOL ambassador global program Aethir Tribe, which aims to bring thousands of KOL ambassadors into the Aethir ecosystem. Community members can directly join the Aethir journey by promoting Aethir's innovative decentralized cloud technology and sharing content on social media. It is reported that the initial Alpha version of the program was launched today, with a maximum of 100 participants, and will last for two weeks. After the Alpha test period, the upper limit will be increased to absorb more community members.

data.title: A whale deposited 7 million FETs in Binance, and currently has a floating loss of $6.7 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited 7 million FETs (about 5.26 million US dollars) to Binance after 6 months of dormancy, and the loss of this operation reached 6.7 million US dollars.

data.title: DeFi App (HOME) Token Lists on Binance, Opens at $0.02733
data.description:
Binance has officially listed DeFi App’s native token, HOME, on its trading platform. The token opened at $0. 2733 and is currently trading at $0. 03564 on Binance Spot. The listing includes support for HOME/USDT and HOME/USDC trading pairs.
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/25522848747857?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: US financial giant DTCC explores issuing stablecoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to people familiar with the matter, a little-known giant company at the core of the US financial system, DTCC, is exploring the issuance of a stablecoin to accelerate the use of digital assets in various markets. People familiar with the matter said that if Washington approves legislation to legalize tokens, the Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTCC), a clearing agency that handles US stock transactions, will consider issuing a stablecoin. (The Information)

data.title: DTCC Explores Stablecoin Issuance to Enhance Digital Asset Utilization
data.description: According to Odaily, insiders have revealed that the Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTCC), a key player in the U.S. financial system, is exploring the issuance of a stablecoin. This initiative aims to accelerate the use of digital assets across various markets. Sources indicate that DTCC, responsible for clearing U.S. stock trades, will consider issuing a stablecoin if legislation in Washington legalizes the token.

data.title: Analysis: The institution that subscribed to WLFI 1 hour ago may be B2C2 Group
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the analysis of chain analyst Ai Yi (@ai_9684xtpa), the institution that subscribed to WLFI 1 hour ago may be B2C2 Group. The address spent 40 million USDT on June 4 to subscribe to 400 million WLFI, with a cost of 0.1 US dollars. The token was received three days after the payment. As of now, the cumulative investment in WLFI is as high as 80 million US dollars. This cost is the same as the cost of DWF Labs spending 25 million USDC on April 9, which is 6.67 times the first round subscription price (0.015 US dollars) and twice the second round subscription price (0.05 US dollars).

data.title: Market News: US SEC Delays Approval of Grayscale Hedera ETF
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news: The US SEC has delayed approval of Grayscale Hedera ETF.

data.title: SEC Delays Decision on Grayscale Hedera Spot ETF
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has postponed its decision regarding the Grayscale Hedera Spot ETF. The market is closely monitoring this development as it could have significant implications for the cryptocurrency sector. The delay comes amid ongoing discussions and evaluations by the regulatory body.
